name: Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds stew meat, cut into 1-inch cubes
4 cups hot cooked noodles or rice
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
1. In a large skillet, brown the beef in hot oil. Drain off excess fat.
2. In a slow cooker, combine the beef, mushrooms, onions, garlic (or garlic powder), oregano, salt, pepper, thyme, and bay leaf.
3. Pour in the beef broth and cooking sherry. Stir to combine.
4. Cook on Low for 8-10 hours or on High for 4-5 hours. Discard the bay leaf.
5. If using Low heat setting, switch to High.
6. In a bowl, mix together the sour cream, flour, and water until smooth.
7. Stir in about 1 cup of the hot liquid into the sour cream mixture.
8. Return all ingredients to the slow cooker; stir to combine.
9. Cover and cook on High for an additional 30 minutes or until thickened and bubbly.
10. Serve over noodles or rice.
